title: Ethiopian Dulet with Injera
description: A traditional Ethiopian dish made with spicy beef and served with a side of sourdough injera.
instructions: Cook dulet according to package instructions.
Warm injera by wrapping it in a damp cloth and microwaving for 20-30 seconds.
Melt garlicky butter in a pan over medium heat.
Sauté goeey red onions in garlicky butter until caramelized.
Assemble dish by placing cooked dulet on top of injera and serving with sautéed onions.
Repeat with remaining injera and dulet.
